channel.title: Web on zx10r Security Notes
channel.description: Web application testing notes covering application mapping, input handling, logic flaws, and clean proof of impact.

item.title: B2R Monster Corporate Writeup
item.description: A boot-to-root writeup for Monster Corporate, covering SMB enumeration, WordPress admin access, plugin RCE, lateral movement with xxd, and cron-based privilege escalation.

item.title: A Practical Web Exploitation Workflow for CTFs and Labs
item.description: A disciplined web testing workflow for mapping application behavior, finding logic flaws, and proving impact cleanly.
